textByHash.393e480aedfe60388d2500ae0d10ceafaae35f30: Sounds swell! You just let me know once you are.
textByHash.564e2ae5a7159a19d8eb9ea1fd6fce2a69368246: Very well, thank you. Still sailing, and surfing, of course!
textByHash.7dd6b956cb49f69c5a695f041ababf26bc329844: A surfer at heart. That's where I got my start, but you can't take a cargo crate on a board, so being a sailor pays the bills!
textByHash.877541257ae01ec175b9bf893c01f8c00f9fd312: Jakob! A master of the surf, my friend. A true guru!
textByHash.931f9ba09a431c429b473a1ce8a5b3c67ea1d781: Very true! Until next time, friend.
textByHash.c26ff1e6b8f5c8aad1b777c580c8ff0f569363ee: Sorry, but I don't think you've got what it takes to surf, friend.
textByHash.d51c4d6cf96f1926d6729bd67fa6abad0b8163d4: Yeah, I think we can make a surfer out of you for sure!
textByHash.ef27fe19375592e9a13022656f62b2f15d5d6782: And you! Until next time, friend.
textByHash.f24cf86ac89bf7218b673a45467173db1544ec0b: I'm so relaxed! Would like a touch more surfing on my rota though.
